title: BEM-578 fix mailbox syntax
objective:
Run script:

scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

picker=scripts/'mailbox_pick_notification.py'
lines=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'MAILBOX_DIRS = [Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt"), Path("governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude")]',
'STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json")',
'TMP_DIR = Path("governance/tmp")',
'PICK_PATH = TMP_DIR / "mailbox_pick.json"',
'MSG_PATH = TMP_DIR / "mailbox_message.txt"',
'',
'def load_state():',
'    if STATE_PATH.exists():',
'        try:',
'            return json.loads(STATE_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            return {}',
'    return {}',
'',
'state = load_state()',
'processed = set(state.get("processed_files", []))',
'candidates = []',
'for folder in MAILBOX_DIRS:',
'    if folder.exists():',
'        for item in sorted(folder.glob("*.md"), key=lambda p: str(p)):',
'            if item.is_file():',
'                candidates.append(item)',
'',
'picked = None',
'for item in candidates:',
'    if str(item) not in processed:',
'        picked = item',
'        break',
'',
'TMP_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'if picked is None:',
'    pick = {"picked": False, "notify_operator": False, "message": "", "mailbox_file": None, "reason": "no_new_mailbox_file"}',
'else:',
'    pick = {"picked": True, "notify_operator": False, "message": "", "mailbox_file": str(picked), "reason": "routine_mailbox_no_telegram_use_decision_queue"}',
'',
'MSG_PATH.write_text("", encoding="utf-8")',
'PICK_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(pick, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + chr(10), encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(pick, ensure_ascii=False))',
]
picker.write_text('\n'.join(lines)+chr(10))

recorder=scripts/'mailbox_record_delivery.py'
rec_lines=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json")',
'PICK_PATH = Path("governance/tmp/mailbox_pick.json")',
'TRANSPORT_PATH = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'REPORT_PATH = Path("governance/reports/mailbox_dispatcher_result.md")',
'',
'def load_json(path, default):',
'    if path.exists():',
'        try:',
'            return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            return default',
'    return default',
'',
'def append_jsonl(path, record):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:',
'        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + chr(10))',
'',
'state = load_json(STATE_PATH, {})',
'pick = load_json(PICK_PATH, {"picked": False, "mailbox_file": None, "reason": "missing_pick"})',
'if pick.get("picked"):',
'    processed = set(state.get("processed_files", []))',
'    processed.add(pick.get("mailbox_file"))',
'    state["processed_files"] = sorted(processed)',
'record = {',
'    "record_type": "mailbox_dispatcher_route",',
'    "cycle_id": "bem578-mailbox-dispatcher-syntax-final",',
'    "mailbox_file": pick.get("mailbox_file"),',
'    "notify_operator": False,',
'    "reason": pick.get("reason"),',
'    "telegram_status": "not_required",',
'    "created_at": "workflow_runtime",',
'    "blocker": None,',
'}',
'append_jsonl(TRANSPORT_PATH, record)',
'state["last_run"] = record',
'STATE_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'STATE_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + chr(10), encoding="utf-8")',
'REPORT_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'report_lines = [',
'    "# BEM-578 | Mailbox Dispatcher Result",',
'    "",',
'    "Дата: workflow_runtime",',
'    "",',
'    "## Result",',
'    "Picked: " + str(pick.get("picked")),',
'    "Mailbox file: " + str(pick.get("mailbox_file")),',
'    "Notify operator: False",',
'    "Reason: " + str(pick.get("reason")),',
'    "",',
'    "## Blocker",',
'    "null",',
']',
'REPORT_PATH.write_text(chr(10).join(report_lines) + chr(10), encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False))',
]
recorder.write_text('\n'.join(rec_lines)+chr(10))

workflow=wfs/'mailbox-dispatcher.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Mailbox Dispatcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/**'
      - 'scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py'
      - 'scripts/mailbox_record_delivery.py'
      - '.github/workflows/mailbox-dispatcher.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: mailbox-dispatcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  dispatch-mailbox:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check mailbox scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py scripts/mailbox_record_delivery.py

      - name: Pick mailbox message
        run: python3 scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py

      - name: Record mailbox route
        run: python3 scripts/mailbox_record_delivery.py

      - name: Commit mailbox route result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/mailbox_dispatcher_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-578 mailbox route result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

report=reports/'bem578_fix_mailbox_dispatcher_syntax_final.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-578 | Fix Mailbox Dispatcher Syntax Final | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 21:54 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nMailbox dispatcher scripts rewritten with `chr(10)` instead of embedded newline literals. Routine mailbox routing no longer sends Telegram. Operator decisions are handled only by structured decision queue.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
record={'record_type':'bem578_fix_mailbox_dispatcher_syntax_final','cycle_id':'bem578-fix-mailbox-dispatcher-syntax-final','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'picker':str(picker),'recorder':str(recorder),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 21:54 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle:
    handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+chr(10))
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem578_fix_mailbox_dispatcher_syntax_final']={'status':'completed','mailbox_telegram':'disabled','newline_strategy':'chr(10)','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 21:54 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+chr(10))
proof=proofs/'bem578_fix_mailbox_dispatcher_syntax_final.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-578 PASS: mailbox dispatcher syntax fixed; no routine Telegram.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(picker),str(recorder),str(workflow),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
